title: orchis × kelleriana
intro: Orchis × kelleriana, also known as the hybrid bee orchid, is a rare and exotic orchid species resulting from the cross-pollination of two different orchid species. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its reported analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Orchis × kelleriana include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be administered orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
